description: flip flops get a cool makeover this season with this pair of nike Chroma Thong slippers. These flip flops add a bold twist to the classic flip-flop design while you flaunt your love for sport, and revel in its comfort.UpperSynthetic leather upper with bright stitich detailingSynthetic leather thong straps with a brand badgeFabric toe separator for optimal comfort and durabilityCushioned rubber footbed for shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
